name: Cream Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, mix flour, salt, mustard, and sugar.
2. Add butter and stir until everything is mixed together.
3. While beating, add egg yolks; stir well to combine.
4. Gradually add cream and then vinegar, stirring constantly.
5. Cook over hot water until the mixture thickens.
6. Strain if necessary.
7. Chill before serving cold.
